---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Describe the problem or limitation you're facing. What use case is not well served today?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to happen. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or examples that help explain the request.
